violations.text: Working containers of liquid ingredients (oil and soy sauce) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
The following were observed in poor repair: -steam table (PIC stated it is non-functional) -Freezer doors (held with tape). New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025

Water was not available at the kitchen hand wash sink at the time of this inspection. PIC stated facility management was performing work and water was expected to be turned on later today. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025
The signage at the service area has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Raw animal foods (beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegetables) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC moved beef during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of the following were observed with an accumulation of food and debris: -ice machine (taken out of service, ice disposed) -spatula on clean knife rack (taken to be cleaned and sanitized). The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized; ice disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

Working containers of oil are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
Rice scoop was observed stored in a dirty container. Items were brought to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
The following were observed in poor repair: -steam table (PIC stated non-functional) -freezer doors (observed with tape holding handles, gaskets torn). New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of debris: -walk-in shelving -freezer doors New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
Hot water was not available at the time of this inspection. PIC stated water heater is in poor repair and is scheduled to be replaced this week. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
The drains to the 3-bay sink were observed in poor repair. Inspector observed the sink slow to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

The following have an accumulation of grease, food, dust, and other debris: -floors and walls throughout the facility, especially at floor-wall junctures -area around grease trap -signage and menu boards -under ventilation fans. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and cookline were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

Raw animal foods (such as beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as vegetables) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of staff, cooked noodles were placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Per staff, food was recently prepared. Food was placed under running cold water and ice during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the rice cooker and fryer in the back have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

The ceiling by the cookline (especially by vents) and floors under and around equipment and mop sink have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and plastic guards at 3 bay sink have an accumulation of black residue, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

Some ceiling tiles were observed in poor repair, ceiling tiles near back area cookline need a material to seal juncture. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2023
Some areas for floor tile grout in the back area prep room were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2024

The floors underneath equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023
